body:
nekomimidusteon:

stop calling her a succubus she is PURE and INNOCENT. it’s quite rude to go around mocking that her cute kitty tail is short and has a little pointed tip. or that she is insatiable in bed and keeps needing more while trying to drain you dry. or the glowing purple womb tattoo she got because it looks cool. these are normal catgirl princess markings and she is not corrupted!!!!!!!
